name: Folic Acid 5mg
source_note: Data compiled for Arogya knowledge base. Verify against 1mg.com and pharmeasy.in for live updates.
uses: Prevention of neural tube defects (preconception and pregnancy)
how_it_works: Water-soluble B9 vitamin converted to tetrahydrofolate, essential for DNA synthesis, cell division, and amino acid metabolism — particularly critical during rapid growth phases.

serious: Masks B12 deficiency anemia (neurological damage can progress — check B12 first)

food_interactions: Can be taken with or without food
what_to_avoid: Always check B12 before treating anemia with folate alone
Preconception supplementation is most critical — start 3 months before planned pregnancy
